text.title: Substack-to-Product Funnel Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Substack-to-Product Funnel output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: no onboarding series for new subscribers

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: recommendations_given populated with a typed value
recommendations_received populated with a typed value
paid_tier_offer populated with a typed value
cross_post_cadence populated with a typed value
publishing_schedule populated with a typed value
onboarding_series populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
